calibration.issue: worldkoora vip1/vip2 dead (domain expired), yallashooot amine 404. All upstream sources dead.
calibration.rootCause: Upstream aggregators (vip.worldkoora.com → mysportv.live → parked domain, yallashooot.tv offline).
calibration.fix: Switched all beIN channels to koraplus (go4score.app edge CDN — kora-plus.app frame.php). Worker proxies /wk/albaplayer/koraplus/, strips ad/tracker scripts, auto-renews HLS tokens via _json=1 endpoint.
